title: Oru Pere Varalaaru Lyrics in Tamil with Full English Meaning | Jana Nayagan

sections.intro: The ultimate anthem for the masses, Oru Pere Varalaaru from Jana Nayagan, is a high-octane tribute to leadership and legacy. Featuring powerful chants of 'Thalapathy' and heavy percussion, this track captures the unstoppable spirit of a people's leader. Explore the deep Tamil meanings and viral insights below.
sections.easterEgg:
Hidden Details You Missed! 🕵️‍♂️

  • The recurring 'Thalapathy' chant is a meta-reference to the lead actor's off-screen persona and political aspirations within the film's narrative.
  • The line 'Oru pere varalaaru' (One name is history) echoes the historical significance of the protagonist's rise from the grassroots to leadership.
sections.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of Jananayagan in this song?

Jananayagan means 'Democracy' or 'Leader of the People', symbolizing someone who stands for the common public.

Who is referred to as 'Thalapathy' in the song?

In the context of the movie, the protagonist who leads the people's movement is addressed as Thalapathy (Commander/Leader).

tamilStanzas:
ஒரு பேரே வரலாறு
அழிச்சாலும் அழியாது
அவன்தானே ஜனநாயகன் 
நம்ம மக்கள் நினைக்காம  ஒரு மாற்றம் பொறக்காது
தர வந்தான் தரமானவன்

உன் பேரே கேட்டா உடல்  உறஞ்சே  போகும்
விழி திரையில் பார்த்தால் மனம் கரைஞ்சே போகும்
நீ தூணா நின்னா ஒரு இனமே வாழும்
நீ தூரம் போனா எங்க உயிரே போகும்

உனக்கே ஒரு யுத்தம் இனியே

உயிரின் உயிரே
அழியாத வரலாற்றுக் கதையே
முடியாத நம் ரத்தம் கரையே
களத்தில் இவன் இருக்கும் வரையே
இருக்கும் பயமே

ஒரு பேரே வரலாறு
ஏ தளபதி
ஏ தளபதி

இவன் வெறி அடங்காதே
இவன் கொடி இறங்காதே
இவன் முடி வணங்காதே
புயல் தலை கோராததே
முக்காலத்தில் எவரும் ஒரு இணை கிடையாதே
இவன் புகழ் அழியாதே
சிங்கம் இறையாகாதே

கோடி மாலைகள் நீயும் எங்க போன போகும்
போகும் வழியே எங்க விழியே
ஒரு மழையா தெரிக்கும்
தந்த சந்தோஷம்
நாங்க நன்றி சொல்லும் நேரம்
எங்கள் மனமே உன்ன தினமே எங்க கனவா சுமக்கும்

உனக்கே ஒரு யுத்தம் இனியே
உயிரே உடல் ரத்தம் துளியே
வருவேன் ஒரு பக்கம் துணையே
உயிரின் உயிரே
அழியாத வரலாற்றுக் கதையே
முடியாத நம் ரத்தம் கரையே
களத்தில் இவன் இருக்கும் வரையே
இருக்கும் பயமே

ஒரு பேரே வரலாறு

englishStanzas:
Oru Pere Varalaaru
Alichaalum Aliyaadhu
Avandhaaney Jananayagan
Namma Makkal Nadaikkaama Oru Maatram Porakaadhu
Thara Vandhaan Tharamaanavan

A single name is history
It cannot be erased even if destroyed
He is the leader of the people
Without our people taking a step, a change won't be born
The man of quality has arrived to give it

Un Pere Keatta Udhal Oramje Pogum
Vizhi Thirayil Paarthal Manam Karamje Pogum
Nee Thoona Ninnaa Oru Iname Vaazhum
Nee Dhooram Ponna Enga Uyire Pogum

Just hearing your name, a smile spreads across the lips
If seen on the screen, the heart melts away
If you stand as a pillar, a race will survive
If you go far away, our life departs

Unakke Oru Yudham Iniyae
Uyire Udhal Ratham Thuliye
Varuven Oru Pakkam Thunaiye
Uyirin Uyire
Azhiyadha Varalaatre Kadhaye
Mudiyadha Nam Ratham Karaye
Kalathil Ivan Irukkum Varaye
Irukkum Bayame

A war is for you from now on
Life is but a drop of blood in the body
I will come by your side as support
The soul of our souls
An unerasable story of history
The endless stain of our blood
As long as he is in the field
Fear will remain (for others)

Ivan Veri Orungaadhe
Ivan Kodi Erangadhae
Ivan Mudi Vanangaadhe
Puyal Thalai Koradhe
Mukkaalathil Evarum Oru Inai Kidayaadhe
Ivan Pugazh Azhiyaadhe
Singam Iraiyagadhe

His fire will not subside
His flag will not come down
His head will not bow
The storm will not touch his hair
In all three eras, there is no equal to him
His fame will not perish
The lion will not become prey

Kodi Maalaigal Neeyum Enga Pona Pogum
Pogum Vazhiye Enga Vizhiye
Oru Mazhaya Therikkum
Thandra Sandhosham
Naanga Nandri Sollum Neram
Engal Maname Unna Dhiname Enga Kanava Sumakko

Wherever you go, millions of garlands follow
Wherever you go, our eyes follow
The happiness you gave
Splashes like a rain
It is time for us to say thanks
Our hearts carry you as our dream every day

Oru Pere Varalaaru
Oru Pere Varalaaru
Alichaalum Aliyaadhu
Avandhaaney Jananayagan
Oru Yugame Kaanadha Makkal Mannan Porandhaaru
Tamil Mannin Tharamaanavan

A single name is history
A single name is history
It cannot be erased even if destroyed
He is the leader of the people
The king of the people, unseen for an era, is born
The man of quality of the Tamil soil

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Oru Pere Varalaaru'?

The song conveys themes of love and connection, highlighting the emotional bond between individuals.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Jana Nayagan'?

This song plays a pivotal role in showcasing the romantic relationship between the lead characters in the film.

Who are the singers of 'Oru Pere Varalaaru'?

The song is sung by Anirudh and Vishal Mishra.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by Vivek.

When was 'Oru Pere Varalaaru' released?

The song is set to be released in 2025.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Pere Varalaaru, the emotional depth of love is beautifully expressed through the harmonious blend of Anirudh and Vishal Mishra's voices. The song encapsulates the essence of connection and longing, making it a heartfelt addition to the narrative of Jana Nayagan. As the characters navigate their feelings, the lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This track is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the joys and challenges of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Pere Varalaaru from Jana Nayagan is a captivating duet that beautifully blends Anirudh's soulful voice with Vishal Mishra's energetic vocals. This song captures the essence of love and celebration, making it a perfect addition to any romantic playlist. Experience the magic of this collaboration that promises to resonate with listeners long after the first listen.
stanzaMeanings: A name is being mentioned, he is the leader, our people think of him as a change-bringer, he has come to give us a new direction.
When your name is called, your eyes will shine, and your heart will overflow. You are the one who lives in our thoughts, even if you are far away, our lives will be with you.

You have a battle to fight, my life will come to you like a drop of blood. I will be your close companion, and this story of the sky cannot end, this blood will remain in time, he will be there, he will be there, don't be afraid.
A name is being mentioned, oh leader, oh leader.
He doesn't rest, his flag won't fall, he won't bow down. In this world, no one can match him, his fame won't fade, he is a lion, he won't back down.

You are the garland of flags, you will go wherever you want. Our eyes will see the path, a rain of happiness will come, we will thank you at the right time, our hearts will remember you every day, we will dream of you.

You have a battle to fight, my life will come to you like a drop of blood. I will be your close companion, and this story of the sky cannot end, this blood will remain in time, he will be there, he will be there, don't be afraid.
A name is being mentioned, a name is being mentioned, he is the leader, our people have seen a new era, the king of the Tamil land has come to give us a new direction.
Oh leader, oh leader, oh leader, a single name is being mentioned.
